title: Articles — Advanced Usage
topics: a/an/the · zero article · generic statements · proper nouns
description: Pokročilé použití členů — kdy nepoužít žádný člen a jak se chybuje.
notes: A/AN → first mention, non-specific: I saw A dog.
THE → specific, known to both: The dog barked all night.
ZERO → generic, plural, uncountable: Dogs are loyal. Water is life.
⚠️  THE with: rivers (the Nile), mountain ranges (the Alps), oceans (the Pacific)
⚠️  NO article: continents (Europe), countries (France), cities (Prague), lakes (Lake Baikal)
⚠️  THE with: the UK, the USA, the Czech Republic (official name with 'Republic')
✓ The life of a soldier is hard. (specific life)
✓ She plays the piano. (musical instruments → the)
✓ She studies piano at university. (subject of study → zero)

examples.en: I bought a book. The book was fascinating.
examples.cz: Koupil jsem knihu. Ta kniha byla fascinující.
Měsíc obíhá kolem Země. (unique objects → the)

examples.en: She goes to school by bus.
examples.cz: Jezdí do školy autobusem. (institution for its purpose → zero)

examples.en: The school we attended was excellent.
examples.cz: Škola, kam jsme chodili, byla vynikající. (specific → the)

quiz.sentence: ___ Amazon is the longest river in South America.
She plays ___ violin in an orchestra.
He was appointed ___ head of department.

tasks: 1. Find 10 sentences in an English newspaper — identify and justify each article use
2. Write a paragraph about your city using articles correctly (min. 8 nouns)
3. Correct the article mistakes: 'The life is beautiful. I play a guitar. Sun rises in east.'
